fixtures.name: baseline
fixtures.description: doctype + root serialization, the simplest round trip

fixtures.name: no-snapshot
fixtures.description: [no-snapshot] is stripped from both the snapshot and the document

fixtures.name: no-save
fixtures.description: [no-save] present in the snapshot, absent from the document

fixtures.name: no-save-in-hook
fixtures.description: a save hook sees existing [no-save] nodes and its own injected [no-save] is still stripped

fixtures.name: extension-debris
fixtures.description: extension-injected elements removed, extension marker attributes stripped from real elements

fixtures.name: hooks
fixtures.description: inline onbeforesnapshot/onbeforesave and registered callbacks, and their snapshot-vs-save order

fixtures.name: doctype-coercion
fixtures.description: a non-HTML5 source doctype is coerced to <!DOCTYPE html>

fixtures.name: outside-root
fixtures.description: comments outside the root <html> element do not survive

fixtures.name: host-attributes
fixtures.description: ephemeral savetoken and durable documentid on the root pass through untouched

fixtures.name: properties-not-attributes
fixtures.description: state in a JS property is absent from both artifacts; the same value in an attribute is present

fixtures.name: form-state
fixtures.description: live values for every control in the step-3 table, reflected into markup

fixtures.name: form-secrets
fixtures.description: password and file inputs are never written into markup (absolute rule)
